message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called anatolia
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 5 people at 18:15 on monday
If the booking fails how about 17:15
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from stevenage and should arrive by 10:15
The train should go to cambridge and should be on the same day as the restaurant booking
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
